'''Dorn Tavers''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. Tavers had once been [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. A survivor of the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] unlike much of the Order, Tavers went on to aid the Rebel Alliance in their mission to destroy the Empire.

==Biography==
Inducted into the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] [[Jedi academy|academy]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] after being discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Dorn Tavers eventually passed his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and ascended to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. Pursuing the path of the [[Jedi Guardian/Legends|Jedi Guardian]] through independent studies, Tavers achieved his goals and served the Order as such. While his role in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] is lost to history, Tavers survived the fall of the Order and the Republic, when the latter's [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] revealed himself to be the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]].<ref name="HG" />

Fleeing Sidious' Jedi hunters, Tavers discarded his [[Jedi apparel/Legends|traditional robes]] for stylized outfits, playing on his love for fashion during his time of hiding. When the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] gained momentum following the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], Tavers' likeness was used in a propaganda piece, along with that of the deceased Jedi [[Sia-Lan Wezz]]. The banner, titled "Remember Alderaan," depicted Tavers and Wezz side by side supporting the Alliance's mission.<ref name="HG" />
